## name: Feature Request about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement title: "[Feature] Short description of the enhancement" labels: enhancement assignees: ""

## Problem

Is your feature request related to a problem? A clear description of what the problem is.

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## User Value/Impact

Who will benefit from this? How does it improve the user experience?

## Additional Context/Screenshots

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
